name: insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/week tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/week, lack of timely updates causes delayed resolutions. We generate weekly claims status summaries instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem_solved: Lack of timely updates on claims status leads to delayed resolutions.
